overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long BE Daily ETF (BEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of BloomEnergy Corporation (NYSE: BE) stock, less fees, and expenses. BE designs and manufactures solid oxide fuel cell systems for on-site power generation and energy resilience. BEG was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
